fields.description: Translations for the nested fields of a group/list option

description: Per-language translation strings for a Home Assistant add-on's config.yaml options (translations/<lang>.yaml), documented at https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/add-ons/translations

configuration.description: Translations for each top-level key in the add-on's `options`/`schema`

network.description: Human readable description for each entry in `ports`, keyed by '<port>/<tcp|udp>'

title: Home Assistant add-on translations file
